parameters.name: text_filter
parameters.description: Apply text filter to search reports based on a keyword

parameters.name: girs
parameters.description: Filter result by custom GIRs (General intel requirements), my_girs or company_pirs. Using multiple value will return result based on the aggregated GIR list

get.summary: Get a breach alert report details

parameters.name: text_filter
parameters.description: Apply text filter to search reports based on a keyword

parameters.name: girs
parameters.description: Filter result by custom GIRs (General intel requirements), my_girs or company_pirs. Using multiple value will return result based on the aggregated GIR list

parameters.name: sub_type
parameters.description: If using filter `type=fintel`, you can then further filter result by subtypes (supports multiple). Allowed values: actor_profile, intelligence_bulletin, service_profile, underground_perspective, underground_pulse, whitepaper, threat_brief, breach_report, intelligence_summary, malware_campaign, fintel_blog

get.description: Returns a fintel report based on id
Returns attachment in form of byte stream
Returns a list of geopol reports (stream)

parameters.name: text_filter

parameters.name: text_filter
parameters.description: Apply text filter to search reports based on a keyword

parameters.name: girs
parameters.description: Filter result by custom GIRs (General intel requirements), my_girs or company_pirs. Using multiple value will return result based on the aggregated GIR list

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter result by type of report (supports multiple). Allowed values: fintel, info_report, breach_alert, spot_report, vulnerability_report, malware_report, geopol_report, situation_report, news_report

parameters.name: sub_type
parameters.description: If using filter `report_type=fintel` or `report_type=geopol_report`, you can then further filter result by subtypes (supports multiple). Allowed values for fintel: actor_profile, intelligence_bulletin, service_profile, underground_perspective, underground_pulse, whitepaper, threat_brief, breach_report, intelligence_summary, malware_campaign, fintel_blog, for geopol: spot_report, intelligence_bulletin, intelligence_summary, tension_point_profile, threat_brief, significant_activity_report, intelligence_estimate, adversary_profile

parameters.name: text_filter
parameters.description: Apply text filter to search reports based on a keyword

parameters.name: girs
parameters.description: Filter result by custom GIRs (General intel requirements), `my_girs` or `company_pirs`. Using multiple value will return result based on the aggregated GIR list

parameters.name: risk_level
parameters.description: Search reports in a given risk level

parameters.description: Search reports with given patch status.

parameters.description: Search reports with given cve type.

parameters.description: Search reports with given cve name.

parameters.description: Search reports with given product name.

get.description: Returns a details of a vulnerabilities report

get.summary: Get a vulnerability report as PDF

Activity.description: Activity information related to the entity

first_seen_ts.description: First time the entity was seen

last_seen_ts.description: Last time the entity was seen

aliases.description: List of alternative names for the actor

handle.description: Handle or identifier of the actor

AdmiraltyCode.description: Admiralty code indicating source reliability and confidence

body.description: Main content body of the report. This field may be omitted in streaming responses when content exceeds the configured maximum size; fetch full report by ID if needed.

creation_ts.description: Timestamp when the report was published first time

entities.description: List of entities mentioned in the report

information_ts.description: Timestamp of the information contained in the report

is_sensitive_source.description: Indicates if the report contains sensitive source derived information

is_truncated.description: True when the body field was omitted due to exceeding size limit; fetch full report by ID if needed

related_reports.description: List of related reports connected to this report

released_ts.description: Timestamp when the report was published last time

sources.description: List of sources referenced in the report

victims.description: List of purported victims mentioned in the report

VulnerabilitiesReportDetailsResponse.description: Minimal schema for a vulnerability report response with keys, types, and descriptions

activity_location.description: List of locations where activity related to the vulnerability has been observed

aliases.description: List of alternative names or identifiers for the vulnerability

body.description: HTML formatted summary of the vulnerability

counter_measure_links.description: List of titled URLs to Counter Measures related to the vulnerability

counter_measures_html.description: HTML formatted summary of countermeasures for the vulnerability

creation_ts.description: Timestamp when the report was published first time

cve_type.description: Type of CVE, for example: Buffer overflow, Privilege escalation, Memory corruption, etc

cvss.description: List of CVSS scores associated with the vulnerability

exploit_status.description: List of exploitation status details for the vulnerability

interest_level.description: List of levels of interest related to the vulnerability

patch_links.description: List of titled URLs to Patches related to the vulnerability

poc_links.description: List of titled URLs to Proofs of Concept related to the vulnerability

product_name.description: Name of the product of the affected software

released_ts.description: Timestamp when the report was published last time

sort_priority.description: Priority used for sorting vulnerability reports

sources.description: List of sources referenced in the report

underground_activity_summary_html.description: HTML formatted summary of underground activity related to the vulnerability

vendor_name.description: Name of the vendor of the affected software
